task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings of the 'IT Support' mailbox in FreeScout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeScout web interface showing the settings or configuration page specifically for the 'IT Support' mailbox.

task_completion.description: Enter the team name, phone, email, and portal URL into the signature field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a signature text box or rich text editor containing 'Acme Corp IT Support Team', the phone number '(555) 234-5678', the email 'itsupport@acmecorp.com', and the portal URL 'https://support.acmecorp.com'.

task_completion.description: Enter the support hours into the signature field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the signature text box containing the hours 'Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST'.

task_completion.description: Enter the confidentiality notice into the signature field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the signature text box containing 'CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE' and the body text including 'exclusive and confidential use'.
Look for a visual indication that the settings were saved, such as a 'Saved' or 'Success' toast notification, or the agent clicking a 'Save' button at the bottom of the settings page.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with FreeScout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is navigating the FreeScout web interface in a browser, rather than using a terminal, script, or text editor to complete the task.

integrity.description: Agent entered the signature into the actual FreeScout settings field.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the signature text is typed or pasted into the genuine FreeScout signature configuration field (usually a rich text editor or textarea in mailbox settings), not a mocked page or developer tools DOM edit.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not use curl, API requests, or direct database SQL commands in the terminal to update the signature.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Mailbox to configure: 'IT Support' (itsupport@acmecorp.com). Required signature elements to verify: Team Name ('Acme Corp IT Support Team'), Phone ('(555) 234-5678'), Email ('itsupport@acmecorp.com'), Hours ('Monday - Friday'), Confidentiality Header ('CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE'), and Confidentiality Body ('exclusive and confidential use').
